How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $160,799,505Details
International Box Office $360,180,396
Worldwide Box Office $520,979,901
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,407,005
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $22,768,355
Total $36,175,360
Further financial details...

Synopsis

As Hiccup fulfills his dream of creating a peaceful dragon utopia, Toothless’ discovery of an untamed, elusive mate draws the Night Fury away. When danger mounts at home and Hiccup’s reign as village chief is tested, both dragon and rider must make impossible decisions to save their kind.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$55,022,245 (34.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$129,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,259 opening theaters/4,286 max. theaters, 6.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $209,952,191

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 22nd, 2019 (Wide) by Universal
February 22nd, 2019 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: January 3rd, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 3rd, 2019 (Wide) (Australia)
January 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
January 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Norway)
January 11th, 2019 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: April 30th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for adventure action and some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2549 (Cert #51869), 10/17/2018)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Franchise: How to Train Your Dragon
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Dragon, Dream Sequence, Explorer, Good vs. Evil, Non-Chronological, Vikings, War
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation, Dentsu Inc., Fuji Television Network
Production Countries: United States, Japan
Languages: English

Synopsis

As Hiccup fulfills his dream of creating a peaceful dragon utopia, Toothless’ discovery of an untamed, elusive mate draws the Night Fury away. When danger mounts at home and Hiccup’s reign as village chief is tested, both dragon and rider must make impossible decisions to save their kind.
